title: Clarity
description: Pixel-perfect 32x textures made to enhance any world.
body:
![Clarity Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f832bcd1778ca20baba3810fe32f05e0cc0767_0.webp)

Clarity aims to be a comprehensive texture enhancement package for a wide variety of Minecraft playstyles, whether survival or creative — modern or medieval. The look of the pack is intended to enhance yet build upon the classic vanilla look, making it easy to adjust to. The 32x resolution is the perfect balance for greatly increasing detail while still maintaining Minecraft's iconic pixelated look.

_Thank you for over 5 million combined downloads across platforms!_

## Notes

Clarity's custom skybox is compatible with [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) natively, and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) through the use of [FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop).

As with all texture packs, shaders will greatly enhance the look of the pack. Shaders can be loaded through [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) natively, or [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) through the use of [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).

Historical versions are available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/clarity/files).

Clarity is also available for [Bedrock Edition.](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.minecraft.net%252fen-us%252fmarketplace%252fpdp%253fid%253dec4fc0d3-0509-4557-8173-aa63851e3707)
